Introduction
The content of this service description (Chapter 1) is used to compile a service catalog that is used in the contract with the client. This introduction and document history below are for internal use only.
It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.)

service summary: Cegeka provides <klant> with an Office 365 Back-up solution. The Cegeka Shared Backup is powered by Commvault. It includes data back-up of: Outlook 365, OneDrive for Business, SharePoint online and Microsoft Teams.  By implementing Cegeka Shared Backup:
standard service components:
Cegeka shall be responsible in providing backup service for the following Office 365 Services:
* Fair use policy – see service description
** Fair use policy – see service description. Deleted files kept indefinitely
*** In-place restores into Teams is not possible. (Microsoft limitation)

Measurement
The pricing of the Service consists of a platform-based, user-based, image-based, server-based and optional Add-On SKU’s
Calculation
(“Price/Unit” x “Number of setups/platforms”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of users”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of images”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of servers”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of ADC pairs”).
